name: Emo Philips
bio: Emo Philips is an American stand-up comedian known for a childlike, halting delivery and a wandering falsetto, building jokes around paraprosdokians and misdirection that reframe an innocent setup with a dark or absurd payoff. He rose to prominence in the 1980s alternative comedy scene, and one of his lines was voted the funniest religious joke in a 2005 poll.

timeline.ev: Album E=mo2 wins New Music Award for best comedy album
HBO special Live at the Hasty Pudding Theatre
Special Emo Philips: Comedian and Mammal

accolades: E=mo2 won the 1985 New Music Award for best comedy album
Joke voted funniest religious joke ever in a 2005 online poll

specials.t: Live at the Hasty Pudding Theatre
